dir.code: stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo
dir.order: so_ct, ngay_ct, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo

items.key: exists(select 1 from kkycct where stt_rec = '{$%c[stt_rec]}' and kkycct.ma_kho = dmkho.ma_kho) and ma_dvcs = @@unit and status = '1'&SiteKey;
items.check: exists(select 1 from kkycct where stt_rec = '{$%c[stt_rec]}' and kkycct.ma_kho = dmkho.ma_kho) and ma_dvcs = @@unit&SiteKey;

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'init$StocktakingAdjustment$(this);load$StocktakingAdjustment$(this);' &WhenBalanceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'init$StocktakingAdjustment$(this);' &WhenBalanceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

declare @dv_yn bit, @nhieu_dvt bit, @siteName nvarchar(512) if @ma_vt <> '' select @nhieu_dvt = nhieu_dvt from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_dvcs = @@unit and ma_kho = @ma_kho) select @dv_yn = 1 select @siteName = ten_kho%l from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho select @siteName as ten_kho%l, isnull(@nhieu_dvt, 0) as nhieu_dvt, isnull(@dv_yn, 0) as dv_yn return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin số liệu kiểm kê đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and dvt = @dvt) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_vi_tri = $ma_vi_tri.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue and dvt = $dvt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if @stt_rec <> $stt_rec.OldValue or @ma_vt <> $ma_vt.OldValue or @ma_kho <> $ma_kho.OldValue or @ma_vi_tri <> $ma_vi_tri.OldValue or @ma_lo <> $ma_lo.OldValue or @dvt <> $dvt.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_vi_tri = $ma_vi_tri.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue and dvt = $dvt.OldValue)) and (stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and dvt = @dvt)) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, @$exists as message return end end

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and dvt = @dvt &AfterUpdate;

declare @message nvarchar(255), @$checkVoucherUnit varchar(32), @$lockedDate nvarchar(512) select @$checkVoucherUnit = ma_dvcs from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @$checkVoucherUnit and r_del = 1) begin select '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin select rtrim(a.dvt) as dvt, b.ten_dvt%l, a.nhieu_dvt from dmvt a left join dmdvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt where a.ma_vt = @ma_vt return end
